title: Track uses of TODO tags
description: This rule identifies TODO tags in comments as they may indicate unfinished or unintended functionality.
recommendation: Remove TODO tags when the work is completed

noncompliant.description: TODO tag found in a function comment

compliant.description: No TODO tag found in a function comment

why_is_this_an_issue: TODO tags may indicate unfinished or unintended functionality, making the codebase harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Remove TODO tags when the work is completed
